settings.title: User Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage profile, appearance, security, and custom instructions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Photo, avatar color, and account details shown in the sidebar.
profile.avatar_too_large: Image must be smaller than 256 KB.
profile.shortcuts_desc: Fast access to main app sections.

security.password_min: New password must be at least 6 characters.
security.password_mismatch: Confirmation does not match the new password.
security.must_change_desc: For security, please update your password before continuing.

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.desc: Edit your local user identifier for the chat session. This ID determines where your preferences and instructions will be saved.

language.label: Reference Language
language.desc: Set your preferred language. The assistant will respond and organize its reasoning in this language.

usermd.title: Customize USER.md
usermd.desc: This Markdown file is loaded into the assistant's system prompt to store your global formatting preferences, tone, or language constraints. It is unique to the current combination of profile and user ID.
usermd.profile_nodesc: No description available for this profile.

schedulesPage.title: Automations
schedulesPage.subtitle: Recurring prompts run automatically by the agent.
schedulesPage.empty_hint: Create an automation to run a prompt on a schedule — daily, weekly, or at a custom interval.
schedulesPage.dialog_subtitle: Choose when to run and what the agent should do.
schedulesPage.session_fixed: Same conversation each run (context is kept)
schedulesPage.feature_disabled: Automations are disabled on the server (set AION_CRON_ENABLED=1 in backend .env and restart the API).
schedulesPage.session_fixed_desc: Reuse one thread so the agent remembers prior runs.
schedulesPage.session_new_desc: Start fresh each time — best for isolated reports.

briefing.name: Morning briefing
briefing.desc: Daily summary of priorities and calendar
briefing.prompt: Give me a concise morning briefing: top priorities, anything due today, and one suggested focus block.

inbox.name: Inbox digest
inbox.prompt: Summarize what I should follow up on this week. Group by urgency and suggest next actions.

weekly.name: Weekly review
weekly.prompt: Run my weekly review: wins, blockers, lessons learned, and three goals for next week.

research.name: Research pulse
research.desc: Track a topic with fresh sources
research.prompt: Research the latest developments on [topic]. Cite sources and highlight what changed since last week.

cron.advanced_hint: Format: minute hour day month weekday — for experts only.
cron.invalid: Invalid schedule. Check the expression or switch to Simple mode.

integrationsPage.title: My integrations
integrationsPage.subtitle: Connect your personal accounts to organization-enabled MCP servers. Values are encrypted on the server.
integrationsPage.empty: No integrations available. Ask an admin to enable MCP servers.
integrationsPage.empty_hint: Integrations connect your accounts to organization-enabled MCP services.
integrationsPage.security: Your credentials are encrypted and tied to your account.
integrationsPage.pat_hint: OAuth not available for this integration. Paste your Personal Access Token (PAT) below.
integrationsPage.org_managed: Managed by your organization — no personal setup required.
integrationsPage.per_user_hint: Enter your personal credentials for this integration.
integrationsPage.feature_disabled: User credentials are disabled on the server (AION_MCP_USER_CREDENTIALS=0).
integrationsPage.checklist_hub: Admin: enable the server in MCP Hub → Enable in chat.
integrationsPage.checklist_per_user: Admin: set credential mode to Per user and save.
integrationsPage.checklist_env: Admin: apply suggested env with ${AION_USER_*} placeholders.
integrationsPage.checklist_login: You must be logged in to save credentials.
integrationsPage.oauth_intro: Connect this integration by signing in securely with your account.
integrationsPage.oauth_callback_missing_slug: OAuth callback error: missing integration identifier.
integrationsPage.oauth_callback_state_mismatch: OAuth security check failed: state mismatch.

thinking.label: Thinking
thinking.disable_desc: Skip extended reasoning for the fastest replies.
thinking.min_desc: Light reasoning — good for everyday questions.
thinking.max_desc: Deepest reasoning for hard problems; slower replies.

chat.stream_recovery: The agent is still working on this chat on the server. Refreshing automatically…

tools.plus_tooltip: Add file or change tools view

profile.label: Profile
profile.active_hint: Tools, skills, and memory sources for this chat.

agent_mode.normal_desc: Balanced chat — tools and memory as configured.
agent_mode.plan_desc: Break work into steps before executing.
agent_mode.deep_research_desc: Longer research runs with the research panel.
agent_mode.ask_desc: Read-only answers without tool side effects.

empty.title: What can I help you with?
empty.subtitle: Ask anything, attach a file, or turn on web search. Answers stream in as they're written.
empty.subtitle_profile: You're on the {{profile}} profile. Ask anything, attach files, or enable web search — replies stream live.
empty.hint_attach: Drag files here or use + to attach

sql_project.hint: Active SQL / navigation project (click to open panel). New messages use this project.

edit.no_reasoning: No reasoning received from the model for this response. This is normal if the backend doesn't expose chain-of-thought or the profile uses reasoning {{level}}.

chat.mcp_errors_hint: Some integrations failed to start. You can still chat with the tools that loaded.
chat.empty_assistant_reply: No content was saved for this reply. Try regenerating or sending your message again.
chat.footer_hint: AION can make mistakes. Consider verifying important information.

project_required.title: Memory Project Required
project_required.desc: This profile uses QueryMemory. For security reasons, using the shared 'default' project is not allowed. Please create a new project to start.
project_required.textarea_placeholder: Create or select a project to unlock chat...

web_search.global_desc: Active Internet connection to obtain updated answers from web sources.
web_search.on_desc: Search the web when the model needs fresh information.
web_search.off_desc: Answers use only local context and attached files.
web_search.modal_desc: Limit search results to specific domains.
web_search.error_duplicate_domain: Domain already present in the list.
web_search.error_max_domains: You can add up to 20 domains.
web_search.domain_hint: Specify the exact domain or use the asterisk to include subdomains.
web_search.no_domains_desc: Add sources above to limit the search.

toast.language_server_error: Could not save to server. Saved locally only.
toast.usermd_saved: USER.md instructions saved successfully to server!
toast.usermd_overlimit: Cannot save: instructions exceed the 1400 character limit.
toast.logout: Signed out successfully. ID reset to default.
toast.server_error: Error saving data to the server.

artifacts.title: Files
artifacts.no_artifacts: No files or artifacts generated in this session.

research.title: Research
research.description: Iterative multi-step research with HTML report. The status remains visible after a page refresh while the research is in progress.
research.empty_panel_p1: No research in panel. Start from the form above or ask the agent in Deep Research mode. Open DevTools → filter

decision.approved: Decision: plan approved with current markdown.

preview.title: Preview (read-only): Goal / context / current task
preview.edit_hint: Edits are made in the blocks above.

memory_dock.title: Project memory
memory_dock.subtitle: Saved SQL queries and MemPalace navigation for the active project.
memory_dock.hint_query: Filter, verify, or edit SELECT statements the agent saved for this project.
memory_dock.hint_navigation: Structured drawers for database exploration: entry points, JOINs, pitfalls, and discoveries.
memory_dock.no_capabilities: This profile does not expose SQL or MemPalace memory.

memory_project.label: Project
memory_project.create_modal_hint: The slug identifies the MemPalace wing and QueryMemory bucket.
memory_project.members_readonly: Only the owner can invite or remove members.
memory_project.page_subtitle: Create projects, scope descriptions, and manage members.
memory_project.no_projects: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
memory_project.no_description: No description — add one to guide the agent on scope.
memory_project.page_footer: SQL queries and MemPalace drawers share the project slug selected in chat.
memory_project.select_project: Select a project from the list.
memory_project.remove_member_confirm: Remove this member from the project?

query_memory.title: SQL queries
query_memory.empty: No saved queries in this project yet. Successful SELECTs are stored here after the agent saves them.
query_memory.empty_hint: Queries appear here after the agent saves them with memory tools.

navigation_memory.title: Navigation
navigation_memory.hint: The agent uses the same wing as the project selected above. Edit drawers here or ask the agent to add structured navigation memory.
navigation_memory.other_wings_hint: No drawers in this wing, but MemPalace has data in other wings — switch project in chat or migrate memory.
navigation_memory.prune_confirm: Delete all drawers in non-project wings? This cannot be undone.
navigation_memory.empty: No navigation memory for this project yet. Ask the agent to add drawers per fact in MemPalace rooms.
navigation_memory.no_content: (no content available — refresh or edit the drawer)

dock.none_hint: Select a tab (Plan / Artifacts / Agent DB / Memory / Prompt).

prompt_debug.title: Prompt
prompt_debug.disabled_hint: Set AION_PROMPT_DEBUG=1 and NEXT_PUBLIC_AION_PROMPT_DEBUG=1 in the repo root .env, then restart backend and chat-ui.
prompt_debug.empty: No snapshots yet. Send a message to capture the full prompt sent to the agent.
prompt_debug.no_injects: No manual injects recorded for this turn.

output.pending: Waiting for turn completion — output appears here after streaming ends.

outcome.no_progress: Turn stopped automatically: no progress for {seconds}s.
outcome.stream_events: Turn stopped automatically: too many stream events.
outcome.control_events: Turn stopped automatically: too many control events.
outcome.tool_calls: Turn stopped automatically: too many tool calls.
outcome.tool_events: Turn stopped automatically: too many tool events.
